hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Create a variable to track your position, starting at 10

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a repeat loop that runs 9 times

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Inside the loop, plant a flower at the current position, then increase the position by 10

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The flowers should end up at positions 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90
